tasks.subject: Task 0: Bootstrap Go module and skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** go.mod, layout dirs (pkg/breezy, cmd/breezyd, cmd/breezy, internal/config, tools), .gitignore, Makefile.

**Verify:** `go test ./...` exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.mod", ".gitignore", "Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go mod tidy succeeds", "go test ./... exits 0", "Makefile targets exist"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Phase 0 probe tool (Python)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tools/probe.py — interactive read/write of any param. Safety-locked credential and network params.

**Verify:** `python3 tools/probe.py --ip 192.168.1.148 --id BREEZY00000000A0 read 0xB9` prints unit-type 17.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/probe.py", "tools/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 tools/probe.py --ip 192.168.1.148 --id BREEZY00000000A0 read 0xB9", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read by hex id", "read all sweeps", "write+reread", "refuses safety-locked params"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Phase 0 - interactive param characterization
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-03-param-map.md. INTERACTIVE — operator-driven.

**Verify:** ≥60 rows; control params have confirmed write effects.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-03-param-map.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -l docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-03-param-map.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all responsive params have rows", "control params confirmed via write+observe", "credential/network marked NEVER"], "interactive": true}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Frame codec (pkg/breezy/frame.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EncodeRequest, DecodeResponse with checksum/header validation. TDD with golden frames.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run Frame` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/frame.go", "pkg/breezy/frame_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run Frame", "acceptanceCriteria": ["golden encode round-trip", "ErrChecksum", "ErrBadHeader", "round-trip property test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Fake device server (pkg/breezy/fakedevice)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In-process UDP server replaying snapshot_148.json from raw sweep.

**Verify:** `go test -race ./pkg/breezy/fakedevice` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/fakedevice/fake.go", "pkg/breezy/fakedevice/fake_test.go", "pkg/breezy/fakedevice/snapshot_148.json"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race ./pkg/breezy/fakedevice", "acceptanceCriteria": ["replays read responses", "stores writes", "FD<id> for unknown", "clean shutdown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: UDP client (pkg/breezy/client.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Client with ReadParam/WriteParam, retries, timeouts, context.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run Client` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/client.go", "pkg/breezy/client_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run Client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy read/write", "ErrUnsupported on FD", "context cancel", "exponential backoff"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Param registry (pkg/breezy/params.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed registry from param-map.md. Lookup by ID/name. Value decoders.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run 'Params|Lookup|Value'` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/params.go", "pkg/breezy/params_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run 'Params|Lookup|Value'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LookupByID/Name", "Value.String per type", "Value.Float64 numeric", "Writable mirrors map"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Discovery (pkg/breezy/discover.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Broadcast 0x7C, collect (IP, deviceID). DiscoverAddrs for tests.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run Discover` passes with 2 fake servers.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/discover.go", "pkg/breezy/discover_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./pkg/breezy -run Discover", "acceptanceCriteria": ["broadcasts to 255.255.255.255 + 192.168.1.255", "extracts deviceID from header", "deduplicates", "context timeout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Config loader (internal/config)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TOML parse, mode-0600 enforcement, reserved-name rejection, defaults.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./internal/config` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/config/config.go", "internal/config/config_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./internal/config", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy parse", "rejects ls/discover/daemon-url", "rejects world-readable", "applies defaults"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: State cache (cmd/breezyd/state.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread-safe per-device snapshot cache.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./cmd/breezyd -run State` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/state.go", "cmd/breezyd/state_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./cmd/breezyd -run State", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RWMutex-guarded", "Get returns copy", "Devices() sorted", "-race clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Poller (cmd/breezyd/poller.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-device polling goroutine; classifies errors via OnError hook.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./cmd/breezyd -run Poller` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/poller.go", "cmd/breezyd/poller_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./cmd/breezyd -run Poller", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ticks at interval", "populates cache", "classifies timeout/checksum/auth", "stops on cancel"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: HTTP server (cmd/breezyd/server.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All spec routes; cache reads, UDP writes, error envelopes.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./cmd/breezyd -run Server` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./cmd/breezyd -run Server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all routes work", "error envelopes with codes", "rejects writes to read-only params"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Metrics + breezyd main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prometheus metrics; main wires everything; graceful shutdown.

**Verify:** `go test -race ./...` and `make build`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/metrics.go", "cmd/breezyd/metrics_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race ./... && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["metrics labeled device/id", "position label on temps", "PollErrors hooked", "signal shutdown", "discovery on-start"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: CLI (cmd/breezy)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thin HTTP CLI; verbs are device-name-first.

**Verify:** `go test -race -v ./cmd/breezy` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezy/main.go", "cmd/breezy/main_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -v ./cmd/breezy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["<name> verb structure", "globals ls/discover/daemon-url", "--daemon flag", "non-zero on error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Live integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build-tagged integration tests against real device.

**Verify:** `BREEZY_INTEGRATION=1 ... go test -tags integration ./pkg/breezy`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "BREEZY_INTEGRATION=1 BREEZY_TEST_DEVICE_IP=192.168.1.148:4000 BREEZY_TEST_DEVICE_ID=BREEZY00000000A0 BREEZY_TEST_DEVICE_PASSWORD=1111 go test -v -tags integration ./pkg/breezy -run Integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build tag integration", "skips without env", "reads unit-type", "speed round-trip 1/2/3"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: README + end-to-end smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README and full-stack smoke against real .148/.152.

**Verify:** Manual; follow README steps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual: follow README steps end-to-end", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README covers install/config/CLI/Prom", "breezy ls shows real devices", "speed change audible", "/metrics has gauges"]}
```
